source_alignment.subject: English
source_alignment.source_statement: Apply phonic knowledge and skills as the route to decode words.
source_alignment.derived_objective_note: This pack focuses on orally blending simple CVC words with minimal reading load.

objective.child_goal: I can listen to sounds, sweep them together and read the whole word.
objective.statement: Blend sounds in simple CVC words to read the whole word.
misconceptions: Says each sound separately but does not blend into a whole word.
Guesses from the picture without checking sounds.
Skips or changes the middle vowel sound.

vocabulary.child_explanation: A small noise in a word.
vocabulary.audio_script: A sound is one small part we can hear in a word.

vocabulary.child_explanation: Push the sounds together to hear the word.
vocabulary.audio_script: Blend means sweep the sounds together until they become a word.
vocabulary.visual_anchor: Sound seeds slide together into one sprout word.

teaching_sequence.child_prompt: Tap the sounds you already know.
teaching_sequence.learning_purpose: Activate known grapheme-phoneme links before blending.
teaching_sequence.audio_script: Let's wake up the sounds first.
teaching_sequence.visual_model: Three calm sound seeds light up one at a time.

teaching_sequence.child_prompt: The sound seeds need to slide together to grow the word.
teaching_sequence.learning_purpose: Introduce blending as a continuous sweep, not separate sounds.
teaching_sequence.audio_script: Listen: c...a...t. Now sweep them together: cat.
teaching_sequence.visual_model: Seeds move along a small river and join into a word sprout.

teaching_sequence.child_prompt: Listen to c-a-t. Sweep the sounds: cat.
teaching_sequence.learning_purpose: Model oral blending with a simple CVC word.
teaching_sequence.visual_model: Each grapheme pulses as the audio plays, then joins into cat.

teaching_sequence.child_prompt: Tap each sound, then slide your finger to blend.
teaching_sequence.learning_purpose: Move from isolated sounds to continuous blending.
teaching_sequence.visual_model: Large touch targets with a sweep trail.

teaching_sequence.child_prompt: Which word did you hear: cat or cot?
teaching_sequence.learning_purpose: Check vowel attention rather than picture guessing.
teaching_sequence.visual_model: Two picture cards with sound buttons.

teaching_sequence.child_prompt: Show Nixi how to sweep c-a-t into cat.
teaching_sequence.learning_purpose: Use teach-back to confirm the blending process.
teaching_sequence.audio_script: Can you help me blend the sounds?
teaching_sequence.visual_model: The companion repeats the child's selected sound path.

manipulatives.purpose: Let children hear, tap and sweep sounds into a spoken word.
manipulatives.interaction_notes: Large sound tiles play phoneme audio; a sweep gesture joins them into the word.
manipulatives.accessibility_notes: Works with tap-only mode, replay audio buttons and reduced-motion tile highlighting.

practice.interleaving_notes: Mix short-a, short-o and short-i words only after the child can keep the middle sound stable.

variant_blueprints.purpose: Cover CVC blending across short vowel sets with replayable audio prompts.
variant_blueprints.generation_pattern: phoneme sequence + whole-word choice + two close distractors
variant_blueprints.review_notes: Teacher review must check phoneme audio clarity, accent neutrality and picture support timing.

variant_blueprints.purpose: Build careful listening by contrasting words that differ only by the vowel sound.
variant_blueprints.generation_pattern: minimal-pair CVC set with audio cue and three choices
variant_blueprints.review_notes: Avoid visual guessing; pictures appear only after sound attention is checked.

variant_blueprints.purpose: Ask learners to build words from grapheme tiles after listening to the sound sequence.
variant_blueprints.generation_pattern: target CVC word + six grapheme tiles including two distractors
variant_blueprints.review_notes: Check tile order, target vocabulary familiarity and motor accessibility.

variant_blueprints.purpose: Return previously mastered CVC words after 1, 3, 7 and 14 days with mixed vowels.
variant_blueprints.generation_pattern: review queue selects known words and swaps distractor families
variant_blueprints.review_notes: Do not introduce new graphemes inside retrieval-only prompts.

variant_blueprints.purpose: Provide equivalent low-sensory and reduced-motion versions of core blending checks.
variant_blueprints.generation_pattern: same target words with calm highlight states and no surprise animation
variant_blueprints.review_notes: SEND review must approve audio pacing, reduced motion and visual load.

hints: Listen carefully to the middle sound.
question_variants.explanation: The sounds c-a-t blend together to make cat.

misconception_repairs.misconception: Says each sound separately but does not blend into a whole word.
misconception_repairs.detect_with: Child taps sounds correctly but chooses no whole word or repeats segmented sounds.
repair_sequence: Sweep the tiles together while audio blends into the word.
misconception_repairs.evidence_of_repair: Child blends a new CVC word after the sweep model.

misconception_repairs.misconception: Guesses from the picture without checking sounds.
misconception_repairs.detect_with: Child chooses a visually plausible word with a different phoneme.
repair_sequence: Ask the child to tap the first and middle sounds before choosing.
misconception_repairs.evidence_of_repair: Child selects the word based on sound sequence rather than picture cue.

misconception_repairs.misconception: Skips or changes the middle vowel sound.
misconception_repairs.detect_with: Child confuses cat/cot/cut or similar CVC choices.
repair_sequence: Compare two words with only the vowel changed.
Blend both and ask which matches the audio.
misconception_repairs.evidence_of_repair: Child identifies the middle vowel in two contrasting CVC words.

adaptive_support.low_sensory: Use soft tile glow, no burst effects and quiet audio feedback.
adaptive_support.reduced_motion: Replace sweeping motion with step-by-step tile highlighting.
adaptive_support.audio_first: Every prompt is playable as audio; text remains large and minimal.
adaptive_support.reading_support: Use picture support only after sound check, with large grapheme tiles.
adaptive_support.attention_support: Keep missions to three words with a predictable tap-sweep-choose routine.
adaptive_support.processing_support: Allow unlimited replay and no timers.
adaptive_support.confidence_support: Praise careful listening and repair attempts before correctness.
adaptive_support.eal_support: Use clear picture anchors after phoneme work and repeat target vocabulary aloud.

evidence.mastery_rule: Expected requires accurate blending across at least two vowel sets with replay available; secure requires retained blending with reduced replay and no picture-first guessing.
evidence.parent_summary: Can hear sounds in simple words and blend them together to read the whole word.
evidence.teacher_evidence: Blends CVC words across vowel sounds with reduced adult prompting and improved middle-sound attention.
next_actions: Add new CVC words with the same vowel sound.
Interleave contrasting middle vowels after stable blending.
Move to simple caption reading after secure word-level blending.

qa.notes: Flagship authoring bank includes a curated 60-word CVC review set across audio blending, middle-vowel listening and word building. Candidates remain non-runtime until teacher, phonics and accessibility review.
